name: Hot Turkey Souffle
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup (98% fat-free)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube 3 slices of the bread and place in a greased 8x8x2 inch baking dish.
2. Combine turkey, vegetables, mayonnaise, salt, and pepper.
3. Spoon the mixture over the bread cubes.
4. Trim crust from the remaining bread and lay slices on top.
5. Pour beaten eggs and milk over all.
6. Chill at least one hour in refrigerator. The dish can be made up to this point up to 24 hours before baking.
7. Spoon soup on top and bake at 325°F for 1 hour.
8. Sprinkle cheese on top during the last 10 minutes of baking.
This recipe can be doubled. You can reduce the fat content by using egg substitute, low-fat or no-fat cheese, low-fat or skim milk, and low-fat creamed soups.
